title: Sony FX6 Cinema Camera Evaluation
summary: Full evaluation of the Sony FX6 cinema camera for live production use. Tested low-light performance, SDI output compatibility, and remote control via network.

title: Sennheiser EW-DX Wireless Mic System
summary: Assessment of the EW-DX four-channel Dante receiver for studio and OB use. Focused on latency, RF performance in congested environments, and Dante network integration.

title: AI-Assisted Subtitling Workflow
summary: Proof of concept for an AI-driven live subtitling pipeline using Whisper and custom post-processing. Evaluated accuracy, latency, and integration with existing playout systems.
